description_long: This is a historic stone church complex set within a landscaped area, featuring a main church building with a steeply pitched roof and a smaller, detached bell tower. The church is constructed from light-colored stone with darker roofing, and its walls are punctuated by arched windows and buttresses, typical of Romanesque architecture. The grounds include a cemetery with orderly rows of gravestones, pathways, and manicured greenery, all enclosed by a low stone wall. The bell tower, separate from the main church, is topped with a small spire and appears to have an entrance at its base. The church's main entrance is marked by a prominent arched doorway, and the roof is capped with a simple cross. The overall setting suggests a tranquil, rural parish, with the church serving as the focal point of the community.
description: A historic stone church with a steep roof, arched windows, and a detached bell tower, surrounded by a cemetery and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: The main church facade with its arched entrance and steep roof is prominent, with the bell tower and cemetery visible to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view of the church showing the length of the building, the bell tower in the foreground, and the cemetery extending behind.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the church's stonework, the bell tower to the left, and the landscaped grounds with pathways.
description_view_3: Back view of the church, displaying the full roofline, rear entrance, and the cemetery stretching out to the right.
